backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that manages content sections, printable guides, and technicians with CRUD operations, includes blob storage mixin, and provides HTTP outcall functionality to fetch zip code boundary coordinates from a cloud function.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented home page features: landing page component, navigation icons, smooth scroll behavior, and persistent home button, all with high confidence and mapped test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components including routing, header/footer, educational content with pest selection, various pest-specific content components, photo scanner, quiz, printable guides, and custom hooks for queries and image editing.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color palette for light/dark modes, CSS custom properties for theming, and base styles for the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag, app title 'Bed Bug Educational App', and script reference to the React main.tsx module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with React Query provider and hash-based routing that renders HomePage, QR code page, Location Finder, or main educational content with header/footer based on URL hash, wrapped in error boundary.
frontend/src/components/EducationalConte: Main educational content component with tab navigation (scanner, identify, habitats, prevention, treatment, guides, findLocalHelp) synchronized with hash routing, pest selection UI for 18 different pests, and conditional rendering of pest-specific content sections.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary class component that catches render errors and displays a user-friendly fallback UI with error details and a button to return to the main app.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders a footer component with copyright notice, caffeine.ai attribution link, and a disclaimer about consulting professional pest control services.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header component with app branding, navigation buttons (Home, Location Finder, Help, Share), and dialogs for sharing QR codes and displaying help/contact information.
frontend/src/components/HelpContactDialo: Dialog component displaying contact information for Community Health services including phone number (541-553-2352) and service area (97761).
frontend/src/components/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page with hero section and navigation grid featuring seven cards (Scanner, Identify, Habitats, Prevention, Treatment, Guides, Find Local Help) that link to different app sections via hash navigation.
frontend/src/components/LocationFinder.t: Google Maps integration component with search functionality to find locations, display markers, and show place details using Google Places API and autocomplete service.
frontend/src/components/pests/ArmyAntsCo: Educational content component providing detailed information about army ants including identification, physical characteristics, species distribution, habitats, behavior patterns, and safety notices. Organized into multiple cards covering identification, ecology, and raiding patterns.
frontend/src/components/pests/BeetlesCon: Educational content component describing common household beetles including carpet beetles, flour beetles, and grain weevils. Covers identification characteristics, infestation signs, entry points, and attractants organized in card sections.
frontend/src/components/pests/BlackAntsC: Educational content component about black ants including little black ants, black garden ants, and pavement ants. Provides identification details, nesting locations, attractants, and safety information with structured card layouts.
frontend/src/components/pests/BlackStink: Educational content component covering stink bugs (brown marmorated, black, and green species) with focus on identification, physical characteristics, overwintering behavior, entry points, and their distinctive odor defense mechanism.
frontend/src/components/pests/CarpenterA: React component displaying comprehensive information about carpenter ants including identification, habitats, prevention, and control methods with alerts for structural damage warnings and safety notices.
frontend/src/components/pests/Cockroache: React component providing detailed cockroach information covering identification of common species, signs of infestation, habitats, hiding places, and safety notices for pesticide use.
frontend/src/components/pests/CommonHous: React component describing common house flies with sections on physical characteristics, life cycle, behavior, attractants, breeding sources, and prevention methods.
frontend/src/components/pests/EarwigsCon: React component explaining earwig identification, behavior patterns, indoor habitats, and attractants with an informational alert noting they are generally harmless nuisance pests.
frontend/src/components/pests/HeadLiceCo: React component covering head lice identification, checking methods, transmission information, and an alert clarifying they are not related to hygiene and don't spread disease.
frontend/src/components/pests/LargeFlies: React component displaying identification, habitat, and prevention information for large flies (blow flies, flesh flies, cluster flies, horse flies). Includes detailed physical characteristics, behavior patterns, and control methods organized in card-based UI sections.
frontend/src/components/pests/MiceConten: React component providing comprehensive information about mice identification, signs of infestation, nesting habits, entry points, and prevention strategies. Features health warnings and detailed guidance on recognizing mouse presence through droppings, gnaw marks, and other indicators.
frontend/src/components/pests/MothsLarva: React component covering clothes moths and pantry moths, including identification of adult moths and larvae, common infestation locations, and prevention methods. Focuses on protecting fabrics and stored foods from moth damage.
frontend/src/components/pests/RedAntsCon: React component detailing red ant species (fire ants, harvester ants, pharaoh ants) with safety warnings about stings and allergic reactions. Includes identification features, nesting locations, attractants, and control strategies with emphasis on fire ant dangers.
frontend/src/components/pests/ScorpionsC: React component providing scorpion identification, safety warnings about stings, habitat information, and prevention tips. Covers common North American species including the Arizona bark scorpion, with emphasis on UV light detection and medical precautions.
frontend/src/components/pests/SpidersCon: React component displaying comprehensive information about spiders including identification, common species, venomous black widows, habitat locations, and prevention/control methods with safety warnings.
frontend/src/components/pests/TicksConte: React component providing detailed tick information including physical characteristics, life cycle, activity patterns, common exposure locations, and prevention strategies with health warnings about tick-borne diseases.
frontend/src/components/pests/WoodBeetle: React component describing wood-boring beetles with identification guides, damage signs, common infestation locations, and professional treatment recommendations with structural damage warnings.
frontend/src/components/PhotoScanner.tsx: Camera and image upload component with editing features (rotation, zoom, crop, enhance), saved scans gallery management, and export/download functionality for pest identification photos.
Displays downloadable PDF guides filtered by content type, with loading states and empty state handling, allowing users to download guides for offline reference.
frontend/src/components/QrCodePage.tsx: Full-page component for displaying and sharing a QR code linking to the app, with options to copy the URL or download the QR code image.
frontend/src/components/SavedScansGaller: Gallery view for displaying saved pest scans with filtering by tags, reordering, deletion, and tag management features.
frontend/src/components/SavedScanTagsEdi: Inline tag editor component allowing users to add, remove, and edit tags for saved pest scans with keyboard shortcuts.
frontend/src/components/sections/Habitat: React component explaining bed bug habitats, hiding spots, feeding behavior, reproduction lifecycle, and environmental preferences with images and detailed descriptions.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeatTre: Alert dialog component displaying critical safety warnings before heat treatment including ammunition removal, furniture handling, and occupancy restrictions with confirm/cancel actions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Identif: React component teaching bed bug identification through visual guides covering adult bugs, life stages, bite marks, and fecal stains with images and detailed descriptions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Prevent: Renders a prevention guide section with cards covering travel precautions and used furniture inspection tips, including images and detailed instructions for avoiding bed bug infestations.
frontend/src/components/sections/Treatme: Displays a heat treatment checklist section with before/during/after tasks, progress tracking, completion stats, and a reminder dialog using custom hooks for persistence.
frontend/src/components/ShareQrCodeDialo: Modal dialog for sharing the app via QR code or URL link, with copy and download functionality plus option to open full QR page.
frontend/src/components/TechnicianFinder: Component for searching pest control technicians by zip code, displaying results with location details and optional map view with boundary visualization.
frontend/src/components/TechnicianMap.ts: React component that renders a Google Map displaying technician locations as markers and optional zip code boundary polygons. Manages map instance, markers, polygons, and info windows with bounds calculation to fit all displayed elements.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGoogleMaps.ts: Hook that loads the Google Maps JavaScript API script with Places library, managing loading state and errors with singleton pattern to prevent duplicate loads.
frontend/src/hooks/useHashRoute.ts: Provides hash-based routing functionality with hash normalization, navigation helpers, and route matching without external router dependencies.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeatTreatmentCheck: Manages heat treatment checklist item completion state with localStorage persistence, providing toggle, reset, and completion statistics functionality.
Handles the heat treatment checklist reminder dialog state with localStorage persistence to track whether the user has confirmed viewing the reminder.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageEditor.ts: Manages image editing state and operations including rotation, zoom, enhancement, and export, processing images through utility functions and maintaining processed results.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useNextRoute.ts: Custom hook that manages sequential navigation through predefined routes (scanner, identify, habitats, etc.) using hash-based routing with next/previous functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching printable guides by content type, technicians by zip code, and zip code boundary coordinates from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSavedScans.ts: Custom hook managing saved pest scans in localStorage with CRUD operations, tagging support, reordering, and backward compatibility for scan data persistence.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom warm educational color palette for light/dark modes using OKLCH color space, plus utility classes for checklists and smooth scrolling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient provider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
frontend/src/types/google-maps.d.ts: TypeScript type declarations for Google Maps JavaScript API including Map, Marker, InfoWindow, Polygon, Places service, and related interfaces.
frontend/src/utils/assert.ts: Type-safe assertion utilities including invariant checks, exhaustive switch helpers, and null/undefined guards for runtime type narrowing.
frontend/src/utils/clipboard.ts: Safe clipboard copy utility with modern API and fallback support, returning structured success/failure results for user feedback.
frontend/src/utils/imageProcessing.ts: Provides canvas-based image manipulation functions including rotate, enhance (contrast/brightness), zoom, and crop operations that return data URLs.
frontend/src/utils/qr.ts: Utilities for generating QR code URLs via external API and downloading them as PNG files with error handling.
frontend/src/utils/safeStorage.ts: Safe localStorage wrapper with availability checks and non-throwing get/set/remove operations that return result objects with success flags.
frontend/src/utils/shareUrl.ts: Utility functions to retrieve the shareable app URL (origin) and full URL including hash for sharing and QR code generation.
frontend/src/utils/useOnUnmount.ts: React hook that safely executes cleanup callbacks (sync or async) when a component unmounts, used for camera stream cleanup.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system, extended theme tokens for UI components, animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document showing a bed bug treatment app with completed home page navigation features and one pending feature request.
